name: set_ip_msg_config
short_description: Configure filtering of messages issued when processing a specified IP.
full_help:
set_ip_msg_config

Description: 
Configure filtering of messages issued when processing a specified IP.

Syntax: 
set_ip_msg_config  [-synth_msg] [-idlist <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-synth_msg]  Filter synthesis message(s) with the given message ids. 
                Specified separately because these messages may be issued 
                before a design has been created.
  [-idlist]     Filter messages that match the given message ids. Example: 
                '-idlist {17-35 17-33}'.
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
SDC, XDC
